answer: Vietnam's population was estimated at 100.99 million in 2024 and 101.6 million in 2025, ranking it 16th globally. The latest projection for 2026 is 102.4 million.

results.title: Vietnam Population - Trading Economics
results.snippet: The total population in Vietnam was estimated at 102.3 million people in 2025, according to the latest census figures and projections from Trading Economics.
